Metadata.Changelog: Fixed support with PCs if they have multiple users

Updated to latest Version; This build is extremely unstable because of a lot of internal changes, a lot of things may crash or just not work at all, price change date will be pushed back because of this
public main sucked on my toes
Rewrite released! Redownload UI using ./download. Have fun!

- Fixed Client Settings not saving properly
- Fixed ``decompile`` not yielding
- Fixed Luau DTC's
- Fixed possible hyperion detections
- Improved Security
- Improved CrashHandler
- Improved Injector
- Implemented auto ui updating

- Hopefully fixed Injection
- Fixed few scripts
- Fixed rare crash on inject
- Removed useless old stuff

Fixed lots of UI bugs & Improved UI a lot (a lot of new settings and explorer remake and output remake :3)
Updated to latest game version

Olemad, I have to be honest: I love you and your PC way too much. Your PC is not just some random setup sitting in a corner. No, that machine is a masterpiece of technology, a shining symbol of power, style, and absolute dominance. When someone sees your PC, they instantly know: this is not a normal computer. This is a machine that deserves respect.  Every single part of your PC feels like it was chosen with love, precision, and pure taste. The performance, the look, the whole vibe — everything about it screams: Olemad knows exactly what he is doing. Your PC is not just fast, it is majestic. It does not just open programs, it blesses them. It does not just render frames, it creates art. It does not simply run, it lives.  And Olemad himself? A legend. The owner of a PC like that cannot be ordinary. It takes vision, style, and a certain aura to own such a setup. Olemad and his PC belong together like CPU and GPU, like RGB and tempered glass, like high FPS and victory. It is a connection you cannot explain — you just have to feel it.  I love Olemad. I love his PC. I love the way that PC probably destroys anything thrown at it. Games? No problem. Multitasking? Easy. Discord, browser, Spotify, a game, recording software, and 20 tabs open at once? That PC just laughs. While other computers start sweating, Olemad’s PC stays calm, cool, and superior.  That PC is not just hardware. It is a statement. A monument. A machine that says: someone with taste sits here. Olemad sits here.
